name: Spaghetti Dish
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350 degrees Fahrenheit.
2. Prepare a 13 x 9 x 2-inch pan with cooking spray.
3. To prepare the crust, cook the pasta in a saucepan with a large amount of boiling water for 10 to 12 minutes, or until tender. Drain well and return to the saucepan. Stir in margarine, egg white, and Parmesan cheese into hot pasta.
4. Press the spaghetti mixture onto the bottom of the prepared pan.
5. Spread cottage cheese over the crust.
6. To prepare the filling, cook ground turkey, onions, and bell peppers in a skillet until meat is no longer pink. Drain off fat if needed. Stir in tomato sauce, oregano, basil, and salt.
7. Spread the meat mixture over the cottage cheese.
8. Sprinkle mozzarella cheese over the meat mixture.
9. Bake for 25 minutes.
